goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 16:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'price', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet'.
Make sure you get 'area', 'price range', and 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 16:30 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on tuesday and should go to bishops stortford
Make sure you get train ID, price, and travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel doesn't need to include internet
Make sure you get area, price range, and star of the hotel
